hero.headline: Bharati Vidyapeeth Online MBA in Sports Management: Fees, Syllabus and Career Scope
hero.sub: NAAC A+ | NIRF #59 University | UGC-DEB Approved | 14 MBA specialisations | Pune legacy since 1964

sections.tldr: Bharati Vidyapeeth Online MBA in Sports Management: NAAC A+, NIRF #59, Rs 1,60,000 total (4 semesters), zero-cost EMI through the university. One of the most unique online MBA specialisations in India. Almost no peer programmes exist in the online MBA market. Covers sports law, athlete management, event sponsorship, venue operations, and sports marketing. From a Pune institution with 60+ years of heritage.

about.body:
Bharati Vidyapeeth (Deemed to be University) offers an Online MBA in Sports Management through its Centre for Online and Distance Education. The university is headquartered in Pune, Maharashtra, established in 1964. It holds NAAC A+ accreditation and NIRF #59 University ranking (2025). The online MBA is UGC-DEB approved.

Sports Management is one of the most unique online MBA specialisations available in India. Almost no UGC-DEB approved university offers this track in their online MBA portfolio. Bharati Vidyapeeth is a rare exception.

The specialisation covers sports law, athlete management, event sponsorship and funding, sports marketing, venue and facility management, league management, sports media rights, and sports governance. These subjects prepare graduates for careers in cricket leagues, football clubs, sports academies, event management companies, sports federations, and sports media organisations.

India's sports industry is growing rapidly. The IPL alone is valued at over $10 billion. Pro Kabaddi, ISL, PKL, and other franchise leagues are creating demand for business professionals who understand sports operations. Sports academies, stadium operators, and sports technology companies need managers with both business credentials and sports domain knowledge.

Pune hosts sports academies, fitness companies, and is home to ISL and PKL franchise operations. Bharati Vidyapeeth's Pune base connects graduates to this sports ecosystem.

EdifyEdu verifies data independently and takes no commission from any university.

syllabus.note: Detailed Sem 3-4 curriculum for Bharati Vidyapeeth's Sports Management specialisation is shared at admission. Our counsellor can share the current subject list within 24 hours.

whoHires.body:
Sports Management MBA graduates from Bharati Vidyapeeth Online target roles across India's growing sports ecosystem:

**Industries:** Cricket leagues (IPL teams, state associations), football clubs (ISL), kabaddi leagues (PKL), sports academies, fitness chains, sports event management, sports media and broadcasting, sports technology, sports federations, and stadium/venue management

**Entry-level roles:** Sports Marketing Executive, Event Coordinator (Sports), Academy Operations Associate, Sponsorship Sales Executive, Sports Content Associate, Fan Engagement Executive

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years):** Sports Marketing Manager, Athlete Manager, Sponsorship Manager, League Operations Manager, Academy Director, Sports Event Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** CEO (Sports Organisation), Head of Sponsorship, Director of Operations (League/Franchise), VP Sports Marketing, Chief Commercial Officer (Sports Media), Head of Athlete Management

**Employers:** IPL franchise offices, BCCI state associations, ISL clubs, Pro Kabaddi teams, sports management agencies (IMG, Baseline Ventures, JSW Sports, IOS Sports), sports broadcasters (Star Sports, JioCinema), sports academies, and fitness chains.

skills.body:
The Sports Management specialisation builds skills that sports organisations, leagues, and event companies test at manager levels:

**Technical skills:**
- Sports Law: player contracts, transfer rules, anti-doping regulations, intellectual property in sports (broadcast rights, merchandise licensing), and sports tribunal frameworks
- Athlete Management: player career planning, endorsement deal structuring, media management for athletes, and talent development programme design
- Event Sponsorship: sponsorship valuation, sponsorship proposal writing, activation planning, ROI measurement for sponsors, and title sponsorship structure
- Sports Marketing: fan engagement strategy, ticket pricing, merchandise marketing, digital fan communities, and sports brand building

**Applied skills:**
- Venue and Facility Management: stadium operations, event-day management, facility maintenance planning, and safety compliance for sports venues
- League and Governance: league structure design, franchise model management, sports governance frameworks, and anti-corruption compliance in sports

**Soft skills:** Pitching sponsorship proposals to corporate brands, managing athlete-media interactions, coordinating multi-stakeholder event logistics, and negotiating broadcast rights with media companies.

comparisons.body:
Sports Management is an extremely rare online MBA specialisation. Direct peer comparisons are limited because almost no other UGC-DEB approved university offers this track online.

**Unique positioning:** Bharati Vidyapeeth's Online MBA in Sports Management has virtually no direct peer in the Indian online MBA market. No other NAAC A+ university offers a dedicated Sports Management online MBA at this fee point. This makes the specialisation both unique and difficult to benchmark against competitors.

**vs campus Sports Management MBAs:** Some campus-based institutions (IIM Rohtak's Sports Management programme, IISWBM) offer sports management courses. These are full-time, require relocation, and are typically more expensive. Bharati Vidyapeeth at Rs 1,60,000 online allows working sports professionals to earn the credential without leaving their current role.

**vs general MBA + sports career:** A general Marketing or HR MBA from a higher-ranked institution will carry stronger brand recognition but will not include sports law, athlete management, or event sponsorship subjects. If sports is your confirmed career path, the domain-specific curriculum at Bharati Vidyapeeth adds skills that general MBA programmes do not cover.

**Why this spec exists here:** Bharati Vidyapeeth's 14-specialisation portfolio is a product of their legacy distance learning heritage. The institution built niche tracks like Sports Management, Agribusiness, and Event Management when most competitors focused only on standard Finance and Marketing tracks.

fees.body: Bharati Vidyapeeth Online MBA in Sports Management is Rs 1,60,000 flat total across 4 semesters. Zero-cost EMI available directly through the university. Contact our counsellor for registration, application fees, and current EMI tenure options. EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with Bharati Vidyapeeth each quarter. Please reconfirm with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body: Graduates receive an MBA degree certificate issued by Bharati Vidyapeeth (Deemed to be University) with Sports Management noted on the marksheet. The certificate is issued under UGC-DEB 2020 standards. NAAC A+ accreditation and NIRF #59 ranking support employer recognition. The degree is valid for government jobs, PSU recruitment, and higher education. Bharati Vidyapeeth is WES recognised for international credential evaluation. DigiLocker verification is available.

reviews.intro: Three reviews from Bharati Vidyapeeth Online MBA Sports Management students. Ratings reflect individual experience.

items.name: Arun
items.liked: Sports Management MBA online is practically impossible to find. Bharati Vidyapeeth is one of the only options. Sports law and athlete management subjects were exactly what I needed for my role at a cricket academy. The university has been in Pune since 1964 and that heritage adds credibility
items.disliked: The sports industry job market is smaller than mainstream MBA sectors. Career support specific to sports placements could be stronger
items.body: I run coaching programmes at a cricket academy in Pune. No other online MBA at this fee gave me sports-specific business subjects. The athlete management and event sponsorship content directly applies to my work. NAAC A+ on the certificate carries weight with corporate sponsors who evaluate our academy's credibility.

items.name: Meera
items.liked: Event sponsorship and sports marketing subjects were practical. Zero-cost EMI made the fee manageable. The 14-specialisation menu shows Bharati Vidyapeeth has genuine curriculum depth
items.disliked: Syllabus details were not available on the website before enrolment. Had to request through admissions. Brand is weaker than Symbiosis Pune for sports management roles at top agencies
items.body: I work in sports event management in Mumbai. This MBA gave me structured knowledge of sponsorship valuation, fan engagement, and sports governance that I was learning only through on-the-job experience. For sports industry professionals who want formal business credentials, this is one of the very few online options.

items.name: Varun
items.liked: Sports media rights and league management subjects were interesting and relevant to my sports broadcasting role. WES recognition is a bonus for international sports careers
items.disliked: NIRF #59 is outside top-50. For sports management roles at IMG or JSW Sports, premium institutional brands may be preferred. LMS needs improvement
items.body: The Sports Management spec is genuinely unique in the online MBA space. Content covers the key areas. The limitation is brand recognition in the sports industry where relationships and network matter more than degrees. Useful for professionals already in sports who need formal credentials. Less useful for career-switchers trying to break into the sports industry cold.

faqs.question: Why does Bharati Vidyapeeth offer 14 MBA specialisations?
faqs.answer: Bharati Vidyapeeth has a legacy distance learning heritage spanning decades. The university ran distance education programmes long before the online MBA format became common. This institutional experience allowed them to develop and maintain 14 specialisation tracks, including uniquely rare options like Sports Management, Agribusiness, and Infrastructure Management that no other online MBA providers offer.

faqs.question: Is the syllabus shared before admission?
faqs.answer: The full Sem 3-4 subject list is not prominently published on the university website. However, our counsellor can share the current semester-wise syllabus for Sports Management within 24 hours. Request it before confirming admission.

faqs.question: What is the total fee for Bharati Vidyapeeth Online MBA Sports Management?
faqs.answer: Rs 1,60,000 flat total across 4 semesters. Zero-cost EMI is available through the university. Registration and application fees may apply separately. Reconfirm current fees with our counsellor before payment.

faqs.question: Are there any other online MBA programmes with Sports Management?
faqs.answer: Almost none. Bharati Vidyapeeth is one of the only UGC-DEB approved universities offering a dedicated Sports Management online MBA. Some campus programmes (IIM Rohtak, IISWBM) cover sports management but require full-time attendance. For working sports professionals, Bharati Vidyapeeth's online option is essentially unique in the market.

faqs.question: Is the sports industry job market large enough for this specialisation?
faqs.answer: India's sports industry is growing rapidly. IPL, ISL, PKL, and other leagues create demand for business professionals. Sports academies, event companies, sports broadcasters, and athlete management agencies are all hiring. The job market is smaller than mainstream MBA sectors like finance or marketing, so career expectations should be realistic. Prior sports industry exposure significantly strengthens outcomes from this specialisation.

chooseIf: You work in sports (academies, leagues, events, media, athlete management) and want a sports-specific MBA credential.
You want one of the rarest online MBA specialisations in India with almost no peer programmes.
NAAC A+ credentials at Rs 1,60,000 with zero-cost EMI fit your budget for a niche career investment.
consider: If mainstream MBA sectors (finance, marketing, HR) are your career target, standard specialisations from higher-ranked institutions will be more practical.
If you are trying to break into sports without prior industry experience, this MBA alone may not be sufficient. Network building and industry internships are essential.
If campus immersion and sports industry networking matter, campus-based sports management programmes offer more direct access.
